name: GitHub PR Monitor → Slack Daily Summary
description: Fetches open pull requests from a GitHub repository every weekday morning and posts a summary to a Slack channel.

required_secrets.description: Slack bot token with chat:write scope

replacements.config_delta: Replace CHANNEL with TO (recipient address), SUBJECT, and BODY config keys. Required secret: google/gmail_oauth_token instead of slack/bot_token.
Replace CHANNEL+BOT_TOKEN with TOPIC (NATS subject). No auth secret needed. Useful when downstream systems consume from NATS rather than reading Slack.
Replace CHANNEL+BOT_TOKEN with WEBHOOK_URL_SECRET='teams/webhook_url'. Set TITLE='Daily PR Summary'. Required secret: teams/webhook_url instead of slack/bot_token.
